title: Principal Radiologist at GE Healthcare India

jsonLd.title: Principal Radiologist at GE Healthcare India
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Radiologist looking for your next big career move? GE Healthcare India in Ghaziabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About GE Healthcare India:
GE Healthcare India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Clinical Research

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with GE Healthcare India!
